why_this_action.problem: recent curator email fallbacks and fresh publisher outreach were not both being treated as duplicate-contact guards for primary-repo-flat publisher targets
why_this_action.risk: the loop could re-surface already-contacted publishers like TIMEWELL or miss that NxCode had just entered a live review window

verification.live_check: untouched primary targets reduced to ctxt.dev / Signum after adding NxCode and curator-fallback alias guards

replacement_condition: If primary-repo-flat packet selection still resurfaces already-contacted publishers in the next review window, escalate from alias matching into explicit cross-lane target identity tracking.
